summary: Iteration 83: Tested Loyalty Page Enhancements - operator promo code scope validation (backend), collapsible sections with search/filters, Rewards tab badge, Activity tab filters. All backend tests passed (3/3). Frontend loyalty page tests passed (all data-testids and features verified). Create Promotion modal code verified but browser testing had intermittent rendering issues.

intermittent_issues.issue: Intermittent blank page rendering during Playwright automation (page loads but shows white)

critical_code_review_comments: promo_codes.py lines 82-84: Operator scope validation correctly rejects codes without operator_id or wrong operator_id - WORKING
CustomerLoyaltyView.jsx: All collapsible sections have data-testids (redeemable-codes-toggle, redeemed-codes-toggle) - WORKING
CustomerLoyaltyView.jsx: All Redeemed section default collapsed (redeemedOpen = false on line 35) - WORKING
CustomerLoyaltyView.jsx: Search inputs and filter buttons have correct data-testids - WORKING
CustomerLoyaltyView.jsx line 392-394: Rewards tab with badge showing approved promos count - WORKING
ServiceCommunicationsHub.jsx lines 446-489: Create Promotion modal has title/50, message/300 counters, fixed Discount type, number input with % suffix - WORKING
seed_data_creation: Used existing customer data with 2 redeemed promotions (PROMO-80XNX8YT, PROMO-H8GOJS44)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified via code review and partial UI testing. Backend promo code validation with operator_id works correctly. Loyalty page collapsible sections, search inputs, filter buttons all have correct data-testids. Create Promotion modal code has title 50 char limit, message 300 char limit, fixed Discount type, and % suffix on discount input. Intermittent blank page rendering during Playwright - may be Cloudflare challenge or hot-reload timing issue.

tests.test: Rejects operator-scoped code when no operator_id provided
Rejects operator-scoped code when wrong operator_id provided
Accepts operator-scoped code when correct operator_id provided
